ENGLISH: Lone Cleric - At the start of your Short Rest, heal an additional amount equal to the levels of exhaustion you have.
ITALIAN: Chierico Solitario - All'inizio del tuo Riposo Breve, cura un ammontare aggiuntivo pari ai livelli di sfinimento che possiedi.

ENGLISH: Master Memorizer - During your Short Rest, you restore two random spell slots instead of one.
ITALIAN: Maestro Memorizzatore - Durante il tuo Riposo Breve, recuperi due slot incantesimo casuali invece di uno.

ENGLISH: Friendly Company - During Short Rests, always roll Hit Die with advantage. Snell also gains an extra proficiency in his initiative rolls.
ITALIAN: Compagnia Amichevole - Durante i Riposi Brevi, tira sempre i Dadi Vita con vantaggio. Anche Snell ottiene una competenza aggiuntiva nei tiri di iniziativa.

ENGLISH: Infectious Paranoia - Advantage on initiative rolls.
ITALIAN: Paranoia Contagiosa - Vantaggio sui tiri di iniziativa.

ENGLISH: Survival of the Fittest - Advantage on Death Saving Throws.
ITALIAN: Sopravvivenza del più Forte - Vantaggio sui Tiri Salvezza contro Morte.

ENGLISH: Reading the Room - Advantage on behold checks.
ITALIAN: Leggere la Stanza - Vantaggio sulle prove di osservazione.

ENGLISH: Luck of the Fool - Whenever you roll a natural 1, reroll the d20 and take 1d4 damage. If the new result is also a natural 1, repeat this processes. This damage cannot take you below 1 HP.
ITALIAN: Fortuna dello Stolto - Ogni volta che ottieni un 1 naturale, ritira il d20 e subisci 1d4 danni. Se il nuovo risultato è anche un 1 naturale, ripeti il processo. Questi danni non possono portarti sotto 1 PF.

ENGLISH: Dungeoneering Reflexes - Whenever you roll 10 or below, add an extra proficiency to the roll.
ITALIAN: Riflessi da Esploratore - Ogni volta che ottieni 10 o meno, aggiungi una competenza extra al tiro.

ENGLISH: Professional Cleric - You cannot critically fail. (When you roll a natural 1, it is not treated as an automatic failure.)
ITALIAN: Chierico Professionista - Non puoi fallire criticamente. (Quando ottieni un 1 naturale, non viene trattato come un fallimento automatico.)

ENGLISH: Curved, Yet Balanced Bell - Whenever any d20 is rolled, the Strings of Jor causes the outcome to lean towards 10. The chance of critical rolls are diminished.
ITALIAN: Campana Curva ma Equilibrata - Ogni volta che viene tirato un d20, le Corde di Jor fanno tendere il risultato verso 10. Le probabilità di tiri critici sono ridotte.

ENGLISH: Dark Belly of the Soul - Resistance to all damage when below 50% HP.
ITALIAN: Ventre Oscuro dell'Anima - Resistenza a tutti i danni quando sei sotto il 50% dei PF.

ENGLISH: Hjârtat Mitt - Each level of exhaustion grants +1 to each d20 roll instead of -1.
ITALIAN: Hjârtat Mitt - Ogni livello di sfinimento conferisce +1 a ogni tiro di d20 invece di -1.

ENGLISH: A Good Man - Whenever you survive a death saving throw, you get back up with 1d20 HP.
ITALIAN: Un Brav'Uomo - Ogni volta che sopravvivi a un tiro salvezza contro morte, ti rialzi con 1d20 PF.

ENGLISH: Fragile Immortality - Do not roll Death Saving Throws. Whenever you are above 1 HP and take damage that would take you to 0, you go to 1. If you take any damage at 1, you die.
ITALIAN: Immortalità Fragile - Non tirare Tiri Salvezza contro Morte. Ogni volta che sei sopra 1 PF e subisci danni che ti porterebbero a 0, vai a 1. Se subisci qualsiasi danno a 1 PF, muori.

ENGLISH: Imperial Dream - While speaking with someone with less intelligence than yourself, gain an extra proficiency on all d20 rolls.
ITALIAN: Sogno Imperiale - Mentre parli con qualcuno con meno intelligenza di te, ottieni una competenza extra su tutti i tiri di d20.

ENGLISH: Beautiful Lie - While you are at full health and 0 exhaustion, gain advantage on all Charisma d20 rolls.
ITALIAN: Bella Bugia - Mentre sei a salute piena e 0 sfinimento, ottieni vantaggio su tutti i tiri di Carisma con d20.

ENGLISH: Nationalist - Extra proficiency in rolls when speaking with humans.
ITALIAN: Nazionalista - Competenza extra nei tiri quando parli con umani.

ENGLISH: Freestrider - Gain a 10% additional discount in all purchases.
ITALIAN: Cavalcatore Libero - Ottieni uno sconto aggiuntivo del 10% su tutti gli acquisti.

ENGLISH: Azgalist - Whenever you take damage, move one step forward on a secret three step counter. On step one, a 'thesis' d20 die is thrown. On step two, if the damage you took is higher than the 'thesis' die, an 'antithesis' d4 die is thrown. On step three, the damage you took is lowered either by 1, or by the 'antithesis' die if that die was rolled during step two. This is 'synthesis', somehow. The next time you take damage, return to step one.
ITALIAN: Azgalista - Ogni volta che subisci danni, avanzi di un passo in un contatore segreto a tre passi. Al passo uno, viene tirato un d20 'tesi'. Al passo due, se i danni subiti sono superiori al dado 'tesi', viene tirato un d4 'antitesi'. Al passo tre, i danni subiti vengono ridotti di 1, o del dado 'antitesi' se è stato tirato durante il passo due. Questa è la 'sintesi', in qualche modo. La prossima volta che subisci danni, torni al passo uno.

ENGLISH: Arcanist - When you use up your last spell slot of any level, you roll a 1d100. If the result is lower than your natural intelligence, you regain that spell slot.
ITALIAN: Arcanista - Quando esaurisci il tuo ultimo slot incantesimo di qualsiasi livello, tiri un 1d100. Se il risultato è inferiore alla tua intelligenza naturale, recuperi quello slot incantesimo.

ENGLISH: Agrarian - Whenever you pick up food, you roll 1d20. If you get 16 or higher, you get an additional food item.
ITALIAN: Agrario - Ogni volta che raccogli cibo, tiri 1d20. Se ottieni 16 o più, ricevi un oggetto cibo aggiuntivo.

ENGLISH: Apolitical - Increases proficiency in rolls by 1. This amount is increased to 10 on any election day.
ITALIAN: Apolitico - Aumenta la competenza nei tiri di 1. Questo ammontare aumenta a 10 in qualsiasi giorno di elezioni.

ENGLISH: Money Talks - Get 50% extra money on pickup.
ITALIAN: Il Denaro Parla - Ottieni il 50% di denaro in più alla raccolta.

ENGLISH: Azgalian Spirit - Restore 1 Hit Point every hour that passes.
ITALIAN: Spirito Azgaliano - Recupera 1 Punto Ferita ogni ora che passa.

ENGLISH: Lady Fair - Extra proficiency in rolls when speaking with feminine characters.
ITALIAN: Bella Signora - Competenza extra nei tiri quando parli con personaggi femminili.

ENGLISH: Future Patriarch - Extra proficiency in rolls when speaking with masculine characters.
ITALIAN: Futuro Patriarca - Competenza extra nei tiri quando parli con personaggi maschili.

ENGLISH: Mass Media Propaganda - Alters ability score modifiers on equipped texts. Positive modifiers get +1 and negative modifiers get -1.
ITALIAN: Propaganda Mediatica - Altera i modificatori di caratteristica sugli scritti equipaggiati. I modificatori positivi ottengono +1 e quelli negativi -1.

ENGLISH: Human-Dwarf Unity - While you are at full health, whenever you take damage, those dice are rolled with disadvantage.
ITALIAN: Unità Umani-Nani - Mentre sei a salute piena, ogni volta che subisci danni, quei dadi vengono tirati con svantaggio.

ENGLISH: Azgalian Endurance - For every 3 hours spent being exhausted, you lose 1 level of exhaustion.
ITALIAN: Resistenza Azgaliana - Per ogni 3 ore trascorse in stato di sfinimento, perdi 1 livello di sfinimento.

ENGLISH: Defend the City - Alters ability score modifiers on equipped helms. Positive modifiers get +1 and negative modifiers get -1.
ITALIAN: Difendi la Città - Altera i modificatori di caratteristica sugli elmi equipaggiati. I modificatori positivi ottengono +1 e quelli negativi -1.

ENGLISH: True Norvikian - Roll initiative with Strength, if it is higher than your Dexterity.
ITALIAN: Vero Norvikiano - Tira l'iniziativa con Forza, se è superiore alla tua Destrezza.

ENGLISH: Leviathan Apparatus - Enemies always roll initiative with disadvantage.
ITALIAN: Apparato del Leviatano - I nemici tirano sempre l'iniziativa con svantaggio.

ENGLISH: Unstoppable Force - Alters ability score modifiers on equipped weapons. Positive modifiers get +1 and negative modifiers get -1.
ITALIAN: Forza Inarrestabile - Altera i modificatori di caratteristica sulle armi equipaggiate. I modificatori positivi ottengono +1 e quelli negativi -1.

ENGLISH: Invisible Hand - Advantage on all trifle checks.
ITALIAN: Mano Invisibile - Vantaggio su tutte le prove di destrezza minore.

ENGLISH: Immovable Object - Your Dexterity modifier also adds to your haggle discount in shops, stacking with Charisma.
ITALIAN: Oggetto Inamovibile - Il tuo modificatore di Destrezza si aggiunge anche allo sconto contrattazione nei negozi, sommandosi al Carisma.

ENGLISH: Voice of God - Whenever you roll a d20, another hidden d20 is rolled. If that die is the same as your die, you critically succeed. If both are natural twenties, you regain all your hit points, you regain all your spent spell slots, you lose all levels of exhaustion, and you become genuinely happy for 1d4 seconds.
ITALIAN: Voce di Dio - Ogni volta che tiri un d20, un altro d20 nascosto viene tirato. Se quel dado è uguale al tuo, ottieni un successo critico. Se entrambi sono venti naturali, recuperi tutti i punti ferita, tutti gli slot incantesimo spesi, perdi tutti i livelli di sfinimento e diventi genuinamente felice per 1d4 secondi.

ENGLISH: Stringmaster - For each level of spell slot you have, you gain one additional maximum spell slot.
ITALIAN: Maestro delle Corde - Per ogni livello di slot incantesimo che possiedi, ottieni uno slot incantesimo massimo aggiuntivo.

ENGLISH: Communing Patron - If you take damage that would cause you to go to 0, a mysterious force protects you. If this happens, you take no damage, and lose one 1st level spellslot. If you do not have any 1st level spell slots, this does not happen.
ITALIAN: Patrono Comunicante - Se subisci danni che ti porterebbero a 0, una forza misteriosa ti protegge. Se ciò accade, non subisci danni e perdi uno slot incantesimo di 1° livello. Se non hai slot di 1° livello, questo non si attiva.

ENGLISH: Almost Lichdom - Inspired by your favorite pale man, you no longer gain health from healing. You also become invulnerable to all forms of damage. Whenever you take damage of any kind, you always gain one level of exhaustion. Whenever you heal more than 6 HP from any one source, you lose one level of exhaustion.
ITALIAN: Quasi Lichdom - Ispirato dal tuo pallido preferito, non guadagni più salute dalle cure. Diventi anche invulnerabile a tutte le forme di danno. Ogni volta che subisci danni di qualsiasi tipo, guadagni sempre un livello di sfinimento. Ogni volta che curi più di 6 PF da una singola fonte, perdi un livello di sfinimento.

ENGLISH: Esoteric Neuroticism - When you do not have any SHARDS OF JOR, you can spend hit points to unlock dialog options instead. The cost begins at 1 HP, and is doubled each time you use it. The cost resets on a long rest.
ITALIAN: Nevrosi Esoterica - Quando non hai FRAMMENTI DI JOR, puoi spendere punti ferita per sbloccare opzioni di dialogo. Il costo inizia a 1 PF e raddoppia ogni volta che lo usi. Il costo si azzera con un riposo lungo.

ENGLISH: Blood Magic - When you run out of spell slots, you can cast spells with hit points instead. The cost begins at the spell slot level in HP and is multiplied by the amount of times you've activated this effect. The cost resets on a long rest.
ITALIAN: Magia del Sangue - Quando esaurisci gli slot incantesimo, puoi lanciare incantesimi con i punti ferita. Il costo inizia al livello dello slot in PF e viene moltiplicato per il numero di volte che hai attivato questo effetto. Il costo si azzera con un riposo lungo.

ENGLISH: The Cleric - Your healing spells are increased by an extra proficiency. Your heals can also be increased by your Strength modifier instead of your Wisdom modifier, if it is higher.
ITALIAN: Il Chierico - I tuoi incantesimi di cura sono aumentati di una competenza extra. Le tue cure possono anche essere aumentate dal modificatore di Forza invece che da quello di Saggezza, se è superiore.

ENGLISH: Dick-Ass Rogue - The DC of trifle checks are lowered by an extra proficiency.
ITALIAN: Ladro Farabutto - La CD delle prove di destrezza minore è ridotta di una competenza extra.

ENGLISH: God-Emperor Wizard - The amount of spells you can prepare is increased by an extra proficiency. Saving Throws made by targets are also rolled at disadvantage.
ITALIAN: Mago Imperatore - Il numero di incantesimi che puoi preparare è aumentato di una competenza extra. I Tiri Salvezza effettuati dai bersagli vengono anche tirati con svantaggio.

ENGLISH: Askanii Barbarian - Whenever you are at or below 25% HP, add an extra proficiency on all rolls.
ITALIAN: Barbaro Askanii - Ogni volta che sei al 25% o meno dei PF, aggiungi una competenza extra a tutti i tiri.

ENGLISH: Lore-Seeking Bard - Your Behold Checks are rolled with an extra proficiency. Additionally, DCs on flirt rolls are lowered by your proficiency.
ITALIAN: Bardo Cercatore di Sapere - Le tue Prove di Osservazione vengono tirate con una competenza extra. Inoltre, le CD sui tiri di seduzione sono ridotte dalla tua competenza.

ENGLISH: Friendly Local Druid - Extra proficiency in rolls when in natural habitats. This includes outside areas, overgrown areas, and caverns.
ITALIAN: Druido Amichevole del Luogo - Competenza extra nei tiri quando ti trovi in habitat naturali. Questo include aree esterne, aree ricoperte di vegetazione e caverne.

ENGLISH: Leyline Hook - Alters ability score modifiers on TRINKETS. Positive modifiers get +1 and negative modifiers get -1.
ITALIAN: Aggancio alla Linea Ley - Altera i modificatori di caratteristica sui CIONDOLI. I modificatori positivi ottengono +1 e quelli negativi -1.

ENGLISH: Millennia Guardian - The effects from Potions are doubled. For Ability Score increases, this only affects the first potion of a kind you've ingested.
ITALIAN: Guardiano Millenario - Gli effetti delle Pozioni sono raddoppiati. Per gli aumenti di Caratteristica, questo influenza solo la prima pozione di quel tipo che hai ingerito.

ENGLISH: Positive Tingle - Healing spells are rolled with twice the normal amount of dice.
ITALIAN: Formicolio Positivo - Gli incantesimi di cura vengono tirati con il doppio dei dadi normali.

ENGLISH: Scribble the Margins - Your cleric level is doubled when calculating the amount of spells you can prepare.
ITALIAN: Scarabocchia i Margini - Il tuo livello da chierico è raddoppiato quando calcoli il numero di incantesimi che puoi preparare.

ENGLISH: Democratic Herald - You regain 1d4 hit points each time you ask someone what they are voting in the election.
ITALIAN: Araldo Democratico - Recuperi 1d4 punti ferita ogni volta che chiedi a qualcuno cosa voterà alle elezioni.

ENGLISH: SPELLNAME
ITALIAN: SPELLNAME

ENGLISH: SPELL DESC
ITALIAN: SPELL DESC

ENGLISH: The Tea Shop that Blew Up
ITALIAN: The Negozio di Tè that Blew Up

ENGLISH: Your purpose on Tolstad is to investigate an exploded tea shop. Locate this establishment and gain entry.
ITALIAN: Your purpose on Tolstad is to investigate an exploded negozio di tè. Locate this establishment and gain entry.

ENGLISH: The entrance to the tea shop has been shut by Coinlord Darrow. If you want to enter legally, you need his blessing.
ITALIAN: The entrance to the negozio di tè has been shut by Signore delle Monete Darrow. If you want to enter legally, you need his blessing.

ENGLISH: You've managed to get inside the Tea Shop. Time to investigate!
ITALIAN: You've managed to get inside the Negozio di Tè. Time to investigate!

ENGLISH: Clue: You found a magic metal brooch in the ruins. It was half-melted. No normal fire could ever harm a magic item, even a minor one like this.
ITALIAN: Clue: You found a magic metal brooch in the ruins. It was half-melted. No normal fire could ever harm a magic item, even a minor one like this.

ENGLISH: Clue: You found Kargameshian tea left in the ruined tea press. The state of the machine makes it clear someone was brewing at the time of the explosion.
ITALIAN: Clue: You found Kargameshian tea left in the ruined tea press. The state of the machine makes it clear someone was brewing at the time of the explosion.

ENGLISH: Clue: The iron door to the back office was blown open after its hinges melted. That means the explosion surely originated from the central chamber, and that it was extremely hot.
ITALIAN: Clue: The iron door to the back office was blown open after its hinges melted. That means the explosion surely originated from the central chamber, and that it was extremely hot.

ENGLISH: Clue: You found a copy of The Undercommon, a magical magazine infamous for its indestructible paper.
ITALIAN: Clue: You found a copy of L'Undercommon, a magical magazine infamous for its indestructible paper.

ENGLISH: You found a corpse underneath the rubble. The corpse of an elf. You need to report this to Lady Sageleaf.
ITALIAN: You found a corpse underneath the rubble. The corpse of an elf. You need to report this to Lady Sageleaf.

ENGLISH: You convinced Lady Sageleaf that you're an idiot, thus allowing you to not contradict the city's official statement. On election day, you should speak with the Coinlord. He will be happy.
ITALIAN: You convinced Lady Sageleaf that you're an idiot, thus allowing you to not contradict the city's official statement. On elezione day, you should speak with the Signore delle Monete. He will be happy.

ENGLISH: You gave Lady Sageleaf what she needed - evidence to contradict the city's official statement. You've picked a side. The HBT will surely be in your favor now.
ITALIAN: You gave Lady Sageleaf what she needed - evidence to contradict the city's official statement. You've picked a side. The HBT will surely be in your favor now.

ENGLISH: Now for the crucial part: finding the responsible party. Who brought this Necklace of Fireballs to Norvik? Who used it? And why? You have until the election to figure it out.
ITALIAN: Now for the crucial part: finding the responsible party. Who brought this Collana di Palle di Fuoco to Norvik? Who used it? And why? You have until the elezione to figure it out.

ENGLISH: Dragon of Tolstad
ITALIAN: Dragon of Tolstad

ENGLISH: You're here on request of Lady Sageleaf, a goblin chieftain in Tolstad. Go see her, right away. She's in the Goblin Garden, at the southern tip of Tolstad.
ITALIAN: You're here on request of Lady Sageleaf, a goblin chieftain in Tolstad. Go see her, right away. She's in the Giardino dei Goblin, at the southern tip of Tolstad.

ENGLISH: You've spoken with Lady Miska Sageleaf and begun a joint operation with one of her pawns, a goblin named Snell. Let's hope he doesn't get in your way too much.
ITALIAN: You've spoken with Lady Miska Sageleaf and begun a joint operation with one of her pawns, a goblin named Snell. Let's hope he doesn't get in your way too much.

ENGLISH: Coinlord's Meet
ITALIAN: Signore delle Monete's Meet

ENGLISH: You do not have permission to enter the Tea Shop. You need authorization from the Magistrate of Tolstad: Coinlord Darrow. You know his mansion can be found up the hill, on central Tolstad.
ITALIAN: You do not have permission to enter the Negozio di Tè. You need authorization from the Magistrate of Tolstad: Signore delle Monete Darrow. You know his mansion can be found up the hill, on central Tolstad.

ENGLISH: The Magistrate wants to have a meet with you. But he is busy during the day. His doors will be open when it gets dark.
ITALIAN: The Magistrate wants to have a meet with you. But he is busy during the day. His doors will be open when it gets dark.

ENGLISH: You swore an oath to Coinlord Nicholas Darrow, in exchange for access to the tea shop. You serve your master well.
ITALIAN: You swore an oath to Signore delle Monete Nicholas Darrow, in exchange for access to the negozio di tè. You serve your master well.

ENGLISH: You refused to swear an oath to Coinlord Nicholas Darrow. He, in return, refused to give you access to the Tea Shop. You have to find another way in.
ITALIAN: You refused to swear an oath to Signore delle Monete Nicholas Darrow. He, in return, refused to give you access to the Negozio di Tè. You have to find another way in.

ENGLISH: You managed to talk your way past the Coinlord, somehow. Now you've got access to the Tea Shop, and you didn't even have to agree to some sinister deal first. Nice!
ITALIAN: You managed to talk your way past the Signore delle Monete, somehow. Now you've got access to the Negozio di Tè, and you didn't even have to agree to some sinister deal first. Nice!

ENGLISH: You missed your meeting with the Coinlord. Instead, you were given a message by the angel, Ettir.
ITALIAN: You missed your meeting with the Signore delle Monete. Instead, you were given a message by the angel, Ettir.

ENGLISH: Ruffled Feathers
ITALIAN: Ruffled Feathers

ENGLISH: The owner of the tea shop is unaccounted for. Locate this bird-man and find out what he knows.
ITALIAN: The owner of the negozio di tè is unaccounted for. Locate this bird-man and find out what he knows.

ENGLISH: The owner left his tea shop right before the explosion. He was last seen heading below.
ITALIAN: The owner left his negozio di tè right before the explosion. He was last seen heading below.

ENGLISH: The owner of the tea shop was once drunkenly heard bragging about his secret escape plan: shipping himself in a crate to Reeds. You should check the warehouse on Waterlane View.
ITALIAN: The owner of the negozio di tè was once drunkenly heard bragging about his secret escape plan: shipping himself in a crate to Reeds. You should check the warehouse on Waterlane View.

ENGLISH: Drummer was hiding in a crate, set to be exported to Reeds. You found and interrogated him about his tea shop and his illegal smuggling operation. He told you there was a meeting planned between an information broker and a Freestrider right at the time of the explosion.
ITALIAN: Drummer was hiding in a crate, set to be exported to Reeds. You found and interrogated him about his negozio di tè and his illegal smuggling operation. He told you there was a meeting planned between an information broker and a Cavalcatore Libero right at the time of the explosion.

ENGLISH: You let Drummer go, without taking his papers. Maybe he'll leave, or maybe he'll stay. Who knows?
ITALIAN: You let Drummer go, without taking his papers. Maybe he'll leave, or maybe he'll stay. Who knows?

ENGLISH: You took Drummer's papers, making sure he won't leave the city too easily. Maybe he'll slip away anyway, or maybe he'll stick around. Who knows?
ITALIAN: You took Drummer's papers, making sure he won't leave the city too easily. Maybe he'll slip away anyway, or maybe he'll stick around. Who knows?

ENGLISH: The Star Witness
ITALIAN: The Star Witness

ENGLISH: A 'Frank son of Frank' was seen on Pillar Road at the time of the explosion, but calmly walked downstairs afterwards. Locate and question this strange man dressed in yellow. Frank son of Frank is often used as a fake name by rich adventurers around the Coast.
ITALIAN: A 'Frank son of Frank' was seen on Pillar Road at the time of the explosion, but calmly walked downstairs afterwards. Locate and question this strange man dressed in yellow. Frank son of Frank is often used as a fake name by rich adventurers around the Coast.

ENGLISH: A man dressed in yellow was seen by 'The Duck' in the City Below. This man passed by the entrance to the Crypt, heading into the Southern Caverns.
ITALIAN: A man dressed in yellow was seen by 'The Duck' in the Città Sotterranea. This man passed by the entrance to the Crypt, heading into the Southern Caverns.

ENGLISH: Arn, the kiosk kid, says a man in yellow was seen leaving the scene. He was heading down below. Also, he was interested in Freestrider-stuff...
ITALIAN: Arn, the kiosk kid, says a man in yellow was seen leaving the scene. He was heading down below. Also, he was interested in Cavalcatore Libero-stuff...

ENGLISH: Moongore spotted a man in yellow heading through the City Below. He went through the South Caves.
ITALIAN: Moongore spotted a man in yellow heading through the Città Sotterranea. He went through the South Caves.

ENGLISH: Kraaid had an encounter with a human in yellow, who was looking for a 'secret door' to 'further below'.
ITALIAN: Kraaid had an encounter with a human in yellow, who was looking for a 'secret door' to 'further below'.

ENGLISH: Viira explained that a famous revolutionary, who is probably this man in yellow, is visiting Norvik during the election. She does not know where he is.
ITALIAN: Viira explained that a famous revolutionary, who is probably this man in yellow, is visiting Norvik during the elezione. She does not know where he is.

ENGLISH: You found Meriadoc Moonwatch at the lowest point of Jor's Pillar, and rescued him from the horrific troll.
ITALIAN: You found Meriadoc Moonwatch at the lowest point of Jor's Pillar, and rescued him from the horrific troll.

ENGLISH: Moments after the explosion, Meriadoc saw an invisible 'smoky man' rush across the Crossing and then 'enter' the Pillar of Jor. Due to his magical sight, he saw through the veil, and swears it must be a half-open Gate of Jor.
ITALIAN: Moments after the explosion, Meriadoc saw an invisible 'smoky man' rush across the Crossing and then 'enter' il Pilastro of Jor. Due to his magical sight, he saw through the veil, and swears it must be a half-open Portale di Jor.

ENGLISH: Gate of Jor
ITALIAN: Portale di Jor

ENGLISH: An invisible, 'smoking' man was seen entering the Pillar of Jor, right after the explosion. Now you need to figure out a way to follow. Seek the aid of some ancient powerful being that can help you.
ITALIAN: An invisible, 'smoking' man was seen entering il Pilastro of Jor, right after the explosion. Now you need to figure out a way to follow. Seek the aid of some ancient powerful being that can help you.

ENGLISH: According to Visken you need to locate an Astral Projection spell scroll. If you do, he will cast it on you in order for you to enter the Pillar.
ITALIAN: According to Visken you need to locate an Astral Projection spell scroll. If you do, he will cast it on you in order for you to enter il Pilastro.

ENGLISH: You found a Scroll of Astral Projection and gave it to Visken. If you call for him, he will help you enter the Pillar when it is time.
ITALIAN: You found a Scroll of Astral Projection and gave it to Visken. If you call for him, he will help you enter il Pilastro when it is time.

ENGLISH: Olzis suggested that you locate an emerald gemstone. If you do, she will turn it into a Key of Jor.
ITALIAN: Olzis suggested that you locate an emerald gemstone. If you do, she will turn it into a Key of Jor.

ENGLISH: You gave the sphinx a gemstone, and she channeled some intense ancient magic into it. Now you have a Key of Jor that will allow you to enter the Pillar, alone or not.
ITALIAN: You gave the sphinx a gemstone, and she channeled some intense ancient magic into it. Now you have a Key of Jor that will allow you to enter il Pilastro, alone or not.

ENGLISH: Ever-Glad offered to guide you into the Pillar, if you accept his job offer.
ITALIAN: Ever-Glad offered to guide you into il Pilastro, if you accept his job offer.

ENGLISH: You accepted a job offer from the eldritch aberration, and in return he has given you a passphrase that will allow you to enter the Pillar, alone or not.
ITALIAN: You accepted a job offer from the eldritch aberration, and in return he has given you a passphrase that will allow you to enter il Pilastro, alone or not.

ENGLISH: You entered the Pillar alone.
ITALIAN: You entered il Pilastro alone.

ENGLISH: You entered the Pillar with Snell, but you seem to have lost him in the darkness.
ITALIAN: You entered il Pilastro with Snell, but you seem to have lost him in the darkness.

ENGLISH: You entered the Pillar with Snell and Ettir, but you seem to have lost them in the darkness.
ITALIAN: You entered il Pilastro with Snell and Ettir, but you seem to have lost them in the darkness.

ENGLISH: Elven Connection
ITALIAN: Elven Connection

ENGLISH: You found an elven corpse under the tea shop rubble. It's been moved to the Lichhouse for safekeeping.

ENGLISH: An assassin came for your life. You survived, but the attacker got away. With no clues to go on other than an esoteric mask, you must be ready for them to return at any time.
ITALIAN: An assassin came for your life. You survived, but the attacker got away. With no clues to go on other than an esoteric mask, you must be ready for them to return at any time.

ENGLISH: Walking alone at night, a masked assassin came for you. Whoever it was, it sure looks culty. Since they were clearly waiting until you were alone, this is absolutely someone trying to kill you in particular.
ITALIAN: Walking alone at night, a masked assassin came for you. Whoever it was, it sure looks culty. Since they were clearly waiting until you were alone, this is absolutely someone trying to kill you in particular.

ENGLISH: You ran into the assassin in the City Below. The masked attacker seems to have been guarding a specific secret path, leading far down...
ITALIAN: You ran into the assassin in the Città Sotterranea. The masked attacker seems to have been guarding a specific secret path, leading far down...

ENGLISH: You tracked down the assassin all the way to the Old Prison, far beneath the city. The attacker turned out to be Freydis, the daughter of Coinlord Darrow. So you had no choice but to let her go. Now to meet her patron...
ITALIAN: You tracked down the assassin all the way to the Old Prison, far beneath the city. The attacker turned out to be Freydis, the daughter of Signore delle Monete Darrow. So you had no choice but to let her go. Now to meet her patron...

ENGLISH:
Delving ever deeper, you encountered a Trifler in his lair. You had a chat with him, and it appears he was the one behind the attacks- but that it's all water under the bridge now.

What are you going to do? Arrest it?
ITALIAN:
Delving ever deeper, you encountered a Trifler in his lair. You had a chat with him, and it appears he was the one behind the attacks- but that it's all water under the bridge now.

What are you going to do? Arrest it?

ENGLISH: Class Conflict
ITALIAN: Class Conflict

ENGLISH: You're very opinionated. Now it's time to choose a path. Cleric. Rogue. Wizard. Or something else?
ITALIAN: You're very opinionated. Now it's time to choose a path. Chierico. Rogue. Wizard. Or something else?

ENGLISH: You've declared yourself The Cleric of Norvik $CLERIC times. It's a grand title, suitable for a true human cleric like yourself.
ITALIAN: You've declared yourself The Chierico of Norvik $CLERIC times. It's a grand title, suitable for a true human chierico like yourself.

ENGLISH: You have made it clear $ROGUE times now - you're a dick-ass rogue! And nobody can stop you from being the coolest sneaker on Tolstad.
ITALIAN: You have made it clear $ROGUE times now - you're a dick-ass rogue! And nobody can stop you from being the coolest sneaker on Tolstad.

ENGLISH: As of now, you have said, $WIZARD times, that you are a wizard. Which you are. Despite the getup, your true talent lies within the Arcane. Obviously.
ITALIAN: As of now, you have said, $WIZARD times, that you are a wizard. Which you are. Despite the getup, your true talent lies within the Arcane. Obviously.

ENGLISH: After showing your Primal attunement, you're now ready to call yourself an aspiring Druid. Time will tell if this path is in any way interesting to you... by telling folk about it, $DRUID_Choice times.
ITALIAN: After showing your Primal attunement, you're now ready to call yourself an aspiring Druid. Time will tell if this path is in any way interesting to you... by telling folk about it, $DRUID_Choice times.

ENGLISH: You've declared yourself to be a Bard. A dancing bard, supposedly. Considering your track record, you might just end up turning this into a legitimate side-thing. So far, you've told people $BARD_Choice times.
ITALIAN: You've declared yourself to be a Bard. A dancing bard, supposedly. Considering your track record, you might just end up turning this into a legitimate side-thing. So far, you've told people $BARD_Choice times.

ENGLISH: You survived eating the Slogdog, thus learning the ways of the primal warrior. One filled with rage and unprocessed meats. Hence, you're basically already a Barbarian of Askanii. Congratulations. You've spread the word about it, $BARB_Choice times.
ITALIAN: You survived eating the Slogdog, thus learning the ways of the primal warrior. One filled with rage and unprocessed meats. Hence, you're basically already a Barbarian of Askanii. Congratulations. You've spread the word about it, $BARB_Choice times.

ENGLISH: You have found yourself. Congratulations.
ITALIAN: You have found yourself. Congratulations.

ENGLISH: Phoenix Folio
ITALIAN: Phoenix Folio

ENGLISH: After your river adventure, your old spellbook is ruined! Find a service provider who can rebind it for you. Fix your ruined spellbook, damn it!
ITALIAN: After your river adventure, your old spellbook is ruined! Find a service provider who can rebind it for you. Fix your ruined spellbook, damn it!

ENGLISH: You found a bookbinder on Waterlane View. He'll fix your prayer book, but you'll have to pay 250 crowns for the job. And it'll take him till the next morning. Or rather, afternoon, since he's an owl. They seem to be nocturnal. Or maybe it's a bookbinder thing. Don't be judgmental.
ITALIAN: You found a bookbinder on Waterlane View. He'll fix your prayer book, but you'll have to pay 250 crowns for the job. And it'll take him till the next morning. Or rather, afternoon, since he's an owl. They seem to be nocturnal. Or maybe it's a bookbinder thing. Don't be judgmental.

ENGLISH: You managed to get back your prayer book - now rebound and in a shiny fresh condition. This should help a lot in memorizing spells!
ITALIAN: You managed to get back your prayer book - now rebound and in a shiny fresh condition. This should help a lot in memorizing spells!

ENGLISH: Primal Kin
ITALIAN: Primal Kin

ENGLISH: Convince Nessan to teach you primal magic. If you're so inclined.
ITALIAN: Convince Nessan to teach you primal magic. If you're so inclined.

ENGLISH: You attuned to the primal Strings, proving yourself to Nessan. You are now a very newbie Druid - at least in her eyes.
ITALIAN: You attuned to the primal Strings, proving yourself to Nessan. You are now a very newbie Druid - at least in her eyes.

ENGLISH: You've saved a fungal-man on the Undercoast Path. This must certainly put you in alignment with nature.
ITALIAN: You've saved a fungal-man on the Undercoast Path. This must certainly put you in alignment with nature.

ENGLISH: Nessan has invited you to a recurring druidism meetup event. This is exactly what a 27 year old man needs to make more friends.
ITALIAN: Nessan has invited you to a recurring druidism meetup event. This is exactly what a 27 year old man needs to make more friends.

ITALIAN: Crypt Keeper

ITALIAN: There is a powerful spellcaster named Bondevol hiding down in the crypts. You must find him.

ENGLISH: You had a lovely conversation with Bondevol, the demi-lich. He was only somewhat insane.
ITALIAN: You had a lovely conversation with Bondevol, the demi-lich. He was only somewhat insane.

ENGLISH: Lost Mines of Toul'Amon
ITALIAN: Lost Mines of Toul'Amon

ENGLISH:
A dwarf named Akzel is looking for a legendary lost mine, somewhere in the tunnel to the southwest. But the HWBT won't allow him passage. 

Find a symbol of the sun, or lack thereof 'the shrine', then report back to him to get a reward.
ITALIAN:
A dwarf named Akzel is looking for a legendary lost mine, somewhere in the tunnel to the southwest. But the HWBT won't allow him passage. 

Find a symbol of the sun, or lack thereof 'the shrine', then report back to him to get a reward.

ENGLISH: You found an ancient cat-themed shrine, which gave you a poem.
ITALIAN: You found an ancient cat-themed shrine, which gave you a poem.

ENGLISH: Akzel realized he was looking in the wrong place. But the poem seemed to have given him a clue where to search next - he invites you to join him in a couple of months for a proper expedition.

ITALIAN: Philogynistic Agenda

ENGLISH: Women. They're everywhere. Your worth as a man is based only on the admiration you get from them. Your goal? Get a date. A real date. Good luck.
ITALIAN: Women. They're everywhere. Your worth as a man is based only on the admiration you get from them. Your goal? Get a date. A real date. Good luck.

ENGLISH: You managed to secure a promised date with Agent Viira, the handsome orc Freestrider! However, not until after the election. So no need to worry about that now.
ITALIAN: You managed to secure a promised date with Agent Viira, the handsome orc Cavalcatore Libero! However, not until after the elezione. So no need to worry about that now.

ENGLISH: Somehow, you managed to convince the celestial warrior Ettir to go on a date with you, in a couple of weeks or so. Or at least, you think that's what happened. Maybe. Great job!

ENGLISH: This, right here, is the fourth pillar of the feudal system. A spelunking, delving, digging, roaming, true-blooded ADVENTURER.
